extraction_reasoning: The litigation table reports against the Company: 0 criminal, 44 tax, and 8 statutory/regulatory proceedings; against the Promoters: 0 criminal, 10 tax, and 0 statutory/regulatory proceedings; and against Directors and Subsidiaries: nil across the listed categories. I counted only the Company and Subsidiaries for the aggregate amount: ₹87.56 million against the Company, while the Subsidiaries row is nil; the ₹137.63 million against Promoters and all “By” rows, including ₹58.49 million by the Company, were excluded. The contingent-liabilities table is as of June 30, 2023 and lists ₹58.85 million of disputed excise/service tax/GST matters and ₹47.16 million of income-tax matters; because no Total row is shown, these quantified components sum to ₹106.01 million, converted from million to ₹10.601 crore. The disclosed concentration percentages are segment-specific or relate to debtors, super-stockists, distributors, export countries, or OEM customers rather than company-wide top-five/top-ten customer revenue for a full fiscal year, so they are not used.
